data.body: Investigation RESULT (bot-psychologist): ROOT_CAUSE: RED test writer Pre-Flight Checklist Section 5 has no step to verify cross-component field names against contract documents. Dispatch context only injects task description, not contract docs. Both RED test writer and GREEN implementer derive field names from task description text rather than authoritative contract. CONFIDENCE: high. FIX: Add contract lookup step to Pre-Flight Checklist and/or inject contract references in dispatch context.
